title: Note informant de l'accomplissement des procédures et de l'entrée en vigueur

pages.text:
Ambassade de

ni Accra

COURIER A

L'ARRIVEE

EB：.23/06/28

+0 202-0161796

SCR.PO/FR VOL 14

FREEDOM

JUSTICE

REPUBLIC OF GHANA

MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS AND DIGITAL ADD.-GA-057-0036

REGIONAL INTEGRATION

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Regional Integration of the Republic of Ghana presents its compliments to the Embassy of the Republic of France in Accra and with reference to the Embassy's Note no. Accra/SCAC/2020-0161796 dated 23rd March, 2020, this Ministry wishes to inform that pursuant to article 7.1, the "Agreement on the Promotion of Volunteering and Exchanges of Volunteers and Language Assistants" is deemed to have come into force.

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Regional Integration of the Republic of Ghana

avails itself of this opportunity to renew to the Embassy of France in Accra the assurances of its highest consideration

ACCRA, 18TH MAY, 2020

THE EMBASSY OF FRANCE

ACCRA
